mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, a.name AS artisan_name FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id WHERE p.audit_status = 'approved' AND p.is_on_sale = 1 ORDER BY p.sales DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_product WHERE audit_status = 'approved' AND is_on_sale = 1
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, a.name AS artisan_name FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, a.name AS artisan_name FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id WHERE p.audit_status = 'approved' AND p.is_on_sale = 1 AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.craft_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY p.sales DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id WHERE p.audit_status = 'approved' AND p.is_on_sale = 1 AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.craft_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, a.name AS artisan_name FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id WHERE p.artisan_id = #{artisanId} AND p.audit_status = 'approved' AND p.is_on_sale = 1 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_product (name, description, category_id, artisan_id, images, video_url, price, original_price, stock, region, craft_type, story, craft_process, tags, audit_status, is_on_sale) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{artisanId}, #{images}, #{videoUrl}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{region}, #{craftType}, #{story}, #{craftProcess}, #{tags}, COALESCE(#{auditStatus}, 'pending'), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, a.name AS artisan_name FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id ORDER BY CASE p.audit_status WHEN 'pending' THEN 0 WHEN 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, p.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_product SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, is_on_sale = CASE WHEN #{auditStatus} = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE t_product SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, stock = #{stock}, images = #{images}, tags = #{tags}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
